title: Prophethood of Muhammad & Unification of Arabia
video_role: Origin point for Islamic demographic expansion
demographic_significance: Formation of early Muslim community; initial religious consolidation
notes: Pre-modern; conversion/community formation — not Pew-class share anchors.

title: Rashidun Conquests (Arabia → Levant, Egypt, Persia)
video_role: First major wave of Islamic demographic change
demographic_significance: Rapid territorial expansion; gradual religious shift in conquered regions
seed_references: Hugh Kennedy — The Great Arab Conquests (2007)
Fred Donner — The Early Islamic Conquests (1981)

title: Umayyad Caliphate Expansion (to Spain & Central Asia)
video_role: Spread of Islam across three continents
seed_references: Hugh Kennedy — The Great Arab Conquests (2007)
Fred Donner — The Early Islamic Conquests (1981)

title: Abbasid Caliphate & Cultural Golden Age
video_role: Stabilization and deepening of Muslim majorities
demographic_significance: Administrative integration; conversion acceleration in Persia & North Africa
seed_references: Richard Bulliet — Conversion to Islam in the Medieval Period (1979)
Ira Lapidus — A History of Islamic Societies
notes: Bulliet conversion curves are a separate claim family from modern share anchors.

title: Crusades & Counter-Crusades
video_role: Religious conflict and demographic flux in Levant
demographic_significance: Temporary Christian polities in Levant; population displacements

title: Mongol Invasions + Mamluk Period
demographic_significance: Destruction and recovery; shifts in urban populations

title: Rise & Expansion of Ottoman Empire
demographic_significance: Turkish settlement in Anatolia & Balkans; millet system
seed_references: Kemal Karpat — Ottoman Population 1830–1914 (1985)
Stanford Shaw — History of the Ottoman Empire and Modern Turkey
notes: Overlaps peak beacon; early-rise demography is thinner than 19th-c Karpat window.

title: Conquest of Constantinople + Further Expansion
demographic_significance: Major population movements and religious policy shifts
seed_references: Kemal Karpat — Ottoman Population 1830–1914 (1985)
Stanford Shaw — History of the Ottoman Empire and Modern Turkey

title: Ottoman Tanzimat Reforms & Nationalist Stirrings
seed_references: Kemal Karpat — Ottoman Population 1830–1914 (1985)

title: Ottoman Defeat + Greco-Turkish Population Exchange

Lausanne Treaty records

Esther Meir-Glitzenstein — Zionism in an Arab Country
